ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the county is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land class */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the land class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use_statistics" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the counties table */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the land_classes table */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of land parcels in the class */,
  "sum" REAL /* Total area of land in the class (in acres) */,
  "min" REAL /* Minimum area of land in the class (in acres) */,
  "max" REAL /* Maximum area of land in the class (in acres) */,
  "mean" REAL /* Average area of land in the class (in acres) */,
  "perc25th" REAL /* 25th percentile of land area in the class (in acres) */,
  "median" REAL /* Median area of land in the class (in acres) */,
  "perc75th" REAL /* 75th percentile of land area in the class (in acres) */,
  "perc95th" REAL /* 95th percentile of land area in the class (in acres) */,
  "percent_county" REAL /* Percentage of land area in the county that belongs to the class */,
  "percent_max_owner_county" REAL /* Percentage of land area in the class that belongs to the largest owner in the county */,
  "gini" REAL /* Gini coefficient for land area distribution in the class */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the land class (for display purposes) */,
  "data" REAL /* Data value for the land class (for display purposes) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the land class (for visualization purposes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_statistics" (
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land parcel */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the land_use_statistics table */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the owners table */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the land parcel (in acres) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of land area in the county that belongs to the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., individual, corporation, government) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the datasets table */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the datasets table */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user accessed the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
